items.summary: Diagnose and fix the frontend-to-backend connection so that incidents load successfully on both the Dashboard and Admin Panel. The 'Failed to load incidents / Unable to connect to the backend' error must not appear. Audit the full data path: verify the canister ID environment variable is correctly referenced and available at runtime, confirm the useActor hook produces a valid actor instance with anonymous identity for public queries, confirm the useQueries hooks (especially getAllIncidents) receive a non-null actor and invoke backend calls correctly, and ensure no module initialization order or provider wrapping issue (e.g., from ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, or InternetIdentityProvider ordering in App.tsx or main.tsx) is silently preventing actor creation. Fix all identified root causes so incidents are fetched and displayed correctly on page load.
